text:
老成した動物のお肉って、基本的には
硬くなる事が多いはずなのよね。
鍛え抜かれてるようなものだから。

でも、龍族のお肉はそうとは限らない！
……はず。たぶん。きっと。
ううん、間違いない！

根拠のない自信とか言わないで！
お肉の調達、お願い

When you're dealing with the meat of a more
matured animal, it tends to be pretty tough.
The meat's been through a lot, after all.

But that doesn't mean Draconian meat
has to be the same! I hope... Maybe?
We'll see, I guess!

Sure, maybe I'm basing this off nothing,
but still! I want you to go out there and
get some for me.
